signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Traffic and retail sales across the marketplace falling below our expectations, especially in September and October... our digital platforms were delivering roughly a 50/50 split of full price to promotional sales.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Gross margins declined 100 basis points to 43.6% on a reported basis, due to higher markdowns on NIKE Direct, wholesale discounts to liquidate inventory... we've become far too promotional.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: I recognize that some of these actions will have a negative impact on our near-term results... we expect a greater headwind in the fourth quarter compared to the third quarter.
